pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d transformer stacks MLP 3.5x with LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, SmearGate, gated/XSA attention, and Value Residuals with Partial RoPE to boost expressivity.
techniques: MLP 3.5x with LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 and gated/XSA attention
Value Residual plus Partial RoPE and U-Net skips
Late QAT plus Int6 GPTQ-lite quantization
